fields.title: Title

testCases.title: Test cases
testCases.descriptionPlaceholder: Visible sample or hidden edge case

validation.title: Title is required.
validation.testCases: Every test case needs input and expected output.
validation.examples: Examples must be a JSON array.
validation.starterCode: Starter code must be a JSON object with string values.
validation.timeLimit: Time limit must be a positive integer up to 60000.
validation.memoryLimit: Memory limit must be a positive integer up to 4096.
validation.testCaseLimits: Test case limits must be positive integers within the allowed maximums.
